name: notion-workspace
description: Connect Codex to your Notion workspace - search, read, create, and manage pages and databases

interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to your Notion workspace. Search pages, query databases, create and update content, capture knowledge, and manage tasks — all powered by Notion's official MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Search my Notion workspace for project notes.
Create a new page in my Notion workspace.
Query my Notion task database for open items.
